{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323163307DA604B2E08D07B01CB9D"}"},"total":82},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7606408886959784729","common":{"comment_type":21,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"写的好，我喜欢看。主角没有学一身本事就无法无天，也没苟着那都不去，也没多管闲事。做事全凭心情，杀妖也是我想弄死就弄死，我不想弄死就当没看见，打不过的也从来不强出头。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1771010347,"group_id":"7590060274745363518","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N1VZ9my0A7jA4G615PUr80l4vRwPraFZCnfgGJUARCKS","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/8b91e01a7b0242389b43128fe854e4b7~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"3883080993212702","user_name":"喜欢初恋的周修明"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3883080993212702","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7590060274745363518","book_info":{"abstract":"【无系统+真废柴+瞎练版修仙+非洪荒流+杀穿八十一难】
废柴齐天穿越到了西游记世界，等了几个月也没有等到系统的到来，齐天决定，跟着剧情走，混个斗战胜佛当当。但是随着遇到一个个吃人的妖魔，齐天发现自己瞎练出来的御剑术竟意外的好用，就这样，一个一个吃人的妖怪在飞剑下领了盒饭，吃人的妖怪，野生的？杀！佛门的？杀！天庭的？杀！只要是吃人的妖怪，管你是佛门还是道门，只有一个字，杀！这是齐天的故事，也是唐三藏最终成唐三葬的故事。（因为参照原著改写的，所以肯定是走剧情的，唐僧西游路上都是早有仙佛安排的，若是觉得这是阴谋论，那么不喜勿入）","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/d6bb81fc0d5e4fe475f558410318d5fa~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"我是读书人小说也是书","author_id":"","book_id":"7590060274745363518","book_name":"西游之唐三藏被逼成唐三葬了","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#482810","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":1140,"name":"东方仙侠","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1140&name=东方仙侠&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":7,"name":"玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=7&name=玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":259,"name":"奇幻仙侠","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=259&name=奇幻仙侠&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":373,"name":"西游衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=373&name=西游衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":538,"name":"同人","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=538&name=同人&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7590060340340064830","read_count":"482","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"212623"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"6.6","serial_count":"70","tags":"东方仙侠,玄幻,奇幻仙侠,西游衍生,穿越,同人,系统","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/aada1cda6360d645d628c148a80dbbf2~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779438788&x-signature=9%2BOeGFYmgtqlUNKQRpyyjL5mJuE%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],
